title: ZdravLife Premium Hoodie
subtitle: Engineered comfort for the pursuit of vitality
description:
The ZdravLife Premium Hoodie is designed for those who refuse to compromise. Crafted from a heavyweight 400gsm cotton-poly blend, it provides the perfect balance of warmth, durability, and comfort.

Whether you're warming up for a training session, coding through a late-night sprint, or exploring mountain roads at dawn, this hoodie moves with you.

Features

  • Heavyweight 400gsm fabric
  • Reinforced seams for durability
  • Kangaroo pocket with hidden phone sleeve
  • Adjustable hood with premium drawcords
  • Ribbed cuffs and hem
  • Subtle embroidered logo

Fit

Athletic fit with room to move. Size up for a relaxed fit, down for a more fitted look.
shortDescription: Heavyweight premium hoodie with reinforced seams, hidden phone pocket, and subtle embroidered branding. Built for training, travel, and everything in between.

category.name: Apparel
category.description: Premium clothing built for movement and durability.

seo.title: ZdravLife Premium Hoodie | Engineered Comfort
seo.description: Heavyweight premium hoodie with reinforced seams and hidden phone pocket. Built for training, travel, and the pursuit of vitality.

shippingInfo.returnsPolicy: 30-day hassle-free returns. Items must be unworn with tags attached.

title: Vitality Tee
subtitle: Minimal design. Maximum performance.
description:
The Vitality Tee is our daily driver. The shirt you'll reach for whether you're training, traveling, or building something that matters.

Made from a premium blend of organic cotton and performance polyester, it wicks moisture, resists odor, and maintains its shape through hundreds of washes.

Features

  • 160gsm lightweight fabric
  • Moisture-wicking technology
  • Anti-odor treatment
  • Pre-shrunk for consistent fit
  • Minimal chest print
  • Tagless for comfort
shortDescription: Lightweight performance tee with moisture-wicking fabric and anti-odor treatment. Your daily driver for training and life.

category.name: Apparel
category.description: Premium clothing built for movement and durability.

seo.title: Vitality Tee | Performance T-Shirt | ZdravLife
seo.description: Lightweight performance tee with moisture-wicking technology. Built for training, travel, and everyday excellence.

title: Engineer Your Vitality Sticker Pack
subtitle: Decorate your gear. Declare your mindset.
description:
A collection of premium vinyl stickers designed to represent the ZdravLife philosophy. Weatherproof, fade-resistant, and built to last.

Perfect for laptops, water bottles, motorcycle helmets, and anywhere else you want to make a statement.

The Pack Includes

  • 1x Large 'Engineer Your Vitality' sticker (15cm)
  • 1x ZdravLife Logo sticker (8cm)
  • 1x Fist & Mountains sticker (8cm)
  • 1x 'Discipline Over Motivation' sticker (10cm)
  • 1x 'Ride Further' sticker (8cm)
  • 1x Small logo sticker (4cm)
shortDescription: Premium vinyl sticker pack with 6 designs. Weatherproof, fade-resistant, and built to last. Perfect for laptops, helmets, and water bottles.

seo.title: Engineer Your Vitality Sticker Pack | ZdravLife
seo.description: Premium vinyl sticker pack with 6 designs. Weatherproof and fade-resistant for laptops, helmets, and gear.

shippingInfo.returnsPolicy: Due to the nature of this product, returns are not accepted unless defective.

title: Calisthenics Mastery: The Complete Guide
subtitle: Digital training guide for bodyweight strength
description:
A comprehensive 200-page digital guide to building serious strength and muscle using only your bodyweight. Based on three years of training, research, and experimentation.

What's Inside

  • Complete exercise library with 80+ movements
  • Progressive overload strategies for bodyweight training
  • 6-month training programs for all levels
  • Nutrition guidelines for muscle building
  • Recovery and mobility protocols
  • Video demonstrations for every exercise

Programs Included

  • Foundation Program (Beginner)
  • Strength Builder (Intermediate)
  • Elite Strength (Advanced)
  • Skill Acquisition (Planche, Front Lever, Handstand)
shortDescription: 200-page digital guide with 80+ exercises, 6-month training programs, and video demonstrations. Build serious strength with bodyweight training.

title: The 20/4 Fasting Protocol Guide
subtitle: Optimize energy, focus, and body composition
description:
A comprehensive guide to implementing the 20/4 intermittent fasting protocol for high-performers. Based on 3+ years of personal experimentation and research.

What's Inside

  • The science behind time-restricted eating
  • Step-by-step implementation guide
  • Meal timing and macronutrient strategies
  • Training around your fasting window
  • Supplement recommendations
  • Troubleshooting common issues
  • Sample meal plans and recipes

Perfect for software engineers, knowledge workers, and anyone seeking to optimize their cognitive and physical performance.
shortDescription: Complete guide to the 20/4 fasting protocol. Meal plans, training strategies, and optimization tips for high-performers.

title: One-Arm Pullup Roadmap
subtitle: From zero to one: the complete training system
description:
The definitive guide to achieving the one-arm pullup. A progressive, phase-based training system developed over two years of dedicated practice.

What's Inside

  • Complete 18-month training roadmap
  • Phase-based progression system
  • 60+ specific exercises and variations
  • Video demonstrations of every movement
  • Programming templates for all levels
  • Injury prevention and recovery protocols
  • Mental training strategies

Whether you're working toward your first one-arm pullup or looking to refine your technique, this guide provides the systematic approach you need.
shortDescription: Complete 18-month training roadmap for the one-arm pullup. 60+ exercises, video demonstrations, and phase-based programming.

title: ZdravLife Training Journal
subtitle: Track progress. Build consistency. Achieve goals.

A premium training journal designed for serious athletes. Track workouts, monitor progress, and build the consistency that leads to results.

Features

  • 12 months of daily tracking
  • Workout logging templates

  • Body measurement tracking
  • Notes and reflection space
  • Durable hardcover binding
